questions.question: What part did Jack Webb play on the Dragnet series?
One of the pioneers of Rockabilly, this musician wrote and recorded 'Blue Suede Shoes' in 1955.
What Supreme Court case ruled in 1954 that segregation was unconstitutional in public schools?
questions.answer: Brown vs. Board of Education (of Topeka)

questions.question: What was a 'shuckster'?
questions.answer: A liar or cheat; a con-man
